user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: A hearty, traditional American breakfast featuring scrambled eggs, crispy bacon, golden hash browns, and toasted whole-grain bread.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk two large eggs with a splash of milk and scramble in a lightly buttered pan until fluffy. Serve alongside two strips of crispy turkey or pork bacon and a side of shredded potato hash browns browned in olive oil. Accompany with a slice of toasted whole-grain bread and a small side of fresh orange slices.
fields.nutrition_note: High-quality protein from eggs and bacon; complex carbohydrates from whole-grain toast; vitamin C from the orange. Using olive oil for hash browns provides heart-healthy monounsaturated fats compared to traditional frying.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user specifically requested an American breakfast for the 'Greek food filled day'. Based on the context, Day 1 is the Greek-inspired day (containing Greek Yogurt, Shakshuka, and Mediterranean Oatmeal). Position -1 appends this new variety to the existing Mediterranean options.
